title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud and Kaggle are launching a 5-day intensive course on building autonomous AI agents using natural language, termed "vibe coding." The course covers agent workflows, API integrations, agent-to-agent communication, and includes a farming simulation capstone project with leaderboard competition.
